title: loop-ready
description: Written by the orchestrator to signal that a loop is prepared and ready for execution. Read by the main thread and the worker agent.

loop_name.description: Globally unique loop identifier, e.g. ralph-loop-001

loop_file.description: Relative path to the loop file from project root, e.g. plans/phase-1-ralph-loops.md

task_name.description: Human-readable task name from loop frontmatter

todos_count.description: Number of pending todos in this loop

prepared_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the orchestrator finished preparation

status.description: ready = loop prepared for execution; all_complete = no more pending loops

handoff_injected.description: Handoff summary from the prior loop, injected into this loop's context
